posts.author: deletedandreacted
posts.title: New immigration fees | Just The News

link_metadata.description: The new fees, including a $100 charge to apply for asylum and annual penalties for pending cases, also become a self-funding hammer to enforce stricter borders and deter abuse in a system that President Donald Trump has long derided as broken.
link_metadata.title: Trump crafts win-win for taxpayers as new immigration fees will self-fund stricter enforcement
